title: rubus hirtus var. longus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. longus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. longus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support digestive health, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases due to its high antioxidant content. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
